description: As part of the pre-season preparation for the East Asian Winter Monsoon forecast cycle, characterize the Siberian High anticyclone using NCEP sea level pressure climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/. Using Panoply, produce spatially focused Eurasian SLP maps for January and July and write a diagnostic report. Refer to the briefing document at ~/Desktop/cold_surge_brief.txt for specific requirements and save all outputs to the paths specified in the brief.
